queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with borrowers lacking a checking account and their contribution to increased credit risk.
Empirical investigation into the role of loan duration in months as a mitigating factor for credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of maintaining a checking account balance between 0 and 200 DM on credit risk drivers and default likelihood.
